properties.name: Steamoji (Robotics)
properties.description: Build a real robot using VEX kits with block-based coding. Ages 6-8. $499/week. Also available at Calgary North location. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-Steamoji.md

properties.name: Steamoji (Game Design)
properties.description: Design your own board or card game -- draw characters, invent the rules, play with friends. Ages 5+. $399/week. Also at Calgary North. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-Steamoji.md

properties.name: Steamoji (Medieval Eng)
properties.description: Build castles and a catapult -- structural engineering and problem-solving. Ages 5+. $399/week. Also at Calgary North. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-Steamoji.md

properties.name: Steamoji (Digital Story)
properties.description: Make a digital story with crafted props using Scratch Jr. Art + coding + making. Ages 5+. $399/week. Also at Calgary North. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-Steamoji.md

properties.name: Steamoji (Robot City)
properties.description: Build a city of lights and moving bots. Electronics and team design. Ages 5+. $399/week. Also at Calgary North. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-Steamoji.md

properties.name: Steamoji North (extra dates)
properties.address: 2060 Symons Valley Pkwy NW, Calgary, AB
properties.description: Same programs as Steamoji West (Robotics, Game Design, Medieval, Digital Story, Robot City) with additional date options. ~25-30 min from home. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-Steamoji.md

properties.name: SAIT (Acting)
properties.description: Act out characters and bring stories to life on stage. Confidence-building drama games. Grades 2-3. $400/week. Free before/after care. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-SAIT.md

properties.name: SAIT (Crafty Science)
properties.description: Mix art and science -- experiments with colours and materials. Grades 2-3. $400/week. Free before/after care. Currently waitlisted. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-SAIT.md

properties.name: SAIT (Coding)
properties.description: Learn to code by making games and interactive projects. No experience needed. Grades 2-3. $400/week. Free before/after care. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-SAIT.md

properties.name: SAIT (Outdoor)
properties.description: Explore parks and outdoor challenges -- nature and teamwork activities offsite. Grades 2-3. $400/week. Free before/after care. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-SAIT.md

properties.name: SAIT (SciSpy)
properties.description: Solve mysteries using science -- decode clues and run experiments like a detective. Grades 2-3. $400/week. Free before/after care. Currently waitlisted. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-SAIT.md

properties.name: SAIT (STEAM Eng)
properties.description: Design, build, and invent across science, tech, art, and math challenges. Grades 2-3. $400/week. Free before/after care. Currently waitlisted. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-SAIT.md

properties.name: UCalgary (Nature Treks)
properties.description: Daily outdoor exploring -- bugs, hikes, zoo visit, Bowness Park day trip, pool time. Includes swimming. Grades 1-2. $370/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: UCalgary (Climbing)
properties.description: Indoor climbing gym + outdoor adventure park + swimming every day. No experience needed. Grades 2-3. $400/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: UCalgary (LEGO Build)
properties.description: Build giant LEGO cities, bridges, and vehicles as a team. Includes pool time. Grades 2-3. $370/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: UCalgary (Outdoor Sports)
properties.description: A different sport every day -- soccer, kickball, frisbee, cricket, pool games. Grades 2-3. $370/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: UCalgary (GeoVenture)
properties.description: Google Earth and GIS tools + outdoor geocaching to explore geography and natural systems. Grades 2-4. $370/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: UCalgary (LEGO Film)
properties.description: Write, film, and edit your own LEGO stop-motion movie -- ends with a mini film festival. Grades 2-4. $425/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: UCalgary (Early Tech)
properties.description: Build circuits and program a robot using colours -- no typing needed. Intro to electronics. Grades 1-2. $296/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: UCalgary (Dinos Soccer)
properties.description: Girls-only soccer -- drills, games, and scrimmage coached by UCalgary Dinos athletes. Girls Grades 2-3. ~$300/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: UCalgary (Track & Field)
properties.description: Run, jump, and throw events -- mini track meet at end of week. Note: ends 3:15pm (15 min before cutoff). Grades 2-5. $425/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: UCalgary (Architecture)
properties.description: Design and build model buildings inspired by real Calgary architecture. Led by UCalgary students. Grades 2-4. ~$370/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: UCalgary (City Building)
properties.description: Use downtown Calgary streets to design a city -- mapping, models, and urban planning. Grades 2-4. ~$370/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: UCalgary (Landscape)
properties.description: Design parks and outdoor spaces with real materials -- sticks, soil, stones. Sustainable design. Grades 2-4. ~$370/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: UCalgary (Gymnastics)
properties.address: Spray Lake Sawmills Family Sport Centre, Cochrane, AB
properties.description: Recreational gymnastics with fun weekly themes -- circus tricks, wizards, beach week. ~40 min from home. Ages 6-13. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMPS-UofC.md

properties.name: Alien In-Line (Skating)
properties.description: Learn to inline skate from scratch -- all safety gear provided. NW Calgary locations, ~10-25 min from home. Location varies by week (Triwood, Montgomery, Huntington Hills, Edgemont). Ages 6-8. $425/week. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMP-AlienInLine.md

properties.name: Chinook Music (Magic of Music)
properties.description: Singing, dancing, rhythm games, crafts, acting, and dress-up -- all music-themed. No instruments. Ages 5-6. $375/week. Before/after care available. ~15 min from home. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMP-ChinookMusic.md

properties.name: Heritage Park (Prairie Explorers)
properties.description: Explore a historical village -- bannock-making, fur trading, Indigenous traditions, pioneer crafts. Ages 6-9. $325/week. ~20-25 min from home. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMP-HeritagePark.md

properties.name: Rundle (Creative Arts)
properties.description: AM crafts and visual art + PM theatre or other combo. Hands-on creative projects and drama. Grades 1-3. $340-420/week. ~20-25 min from home. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMP-RundleCollege.md

properties.name: Rundle (LEGO)
properties.description: LEGO building and storytelling -- AM or PM half, paired with another camp. Grades 1-3. $340-420/week. ~20-25 min from home. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMP-RundleCollege.md

properties.name: Westmount SC (CAA)
properties.description: Full-day general day camp with themed crafts weeks -- Storybook, Pirate Party, Medieval Times (unicorns!). Grades 1-6. $290/week. Jul 2 - Aug 20. ~15 min from home. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMP-WestmountStudentCare.md

properties.name: Westmount SC (JE)
properties.description: Full-day general day camp -- themed weeks include Witches & Wizards, Out at Sea, Kitchen Chemistry, Out of This World. Grades 1-6. $290/week. Jul 2 - Aug 28. ~20 min from home. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMP-WestmountStudentCare.md

properties.name: STS Summer Camps
properties.description: Art Studio, Crafty Adventurers, Theatre Camp, Forest Explorers. Ages 4-14. Price/hours TBD -- confirm before booking. ~45 min south of home. https://github.com/brianlow/summer-camps-2026/blob/main/CAMP-STS.md
